Hello, my name is Susan Lark,
and I’m a medical doctor with 31
years in clinical practice. But more
importantly, I’m a wife, mother, and
working professional.
Today, at the age of 60, I have
tremendous energy, vitality, and
health. I rarely get colds…my
memory is excellent…my bones and
muscles are strong…my skin is tight
and smooth…and my hormone

But it wasn’t always that way.
Back in my mid-thirties, my health
was absolutely horrible!
On the surface, my life appeared
perfect. I had a happy family, a
thriving medical practice, and
a teaching position at Stanford
University Medical School.
But little by little, the stress of my
personal and professional life began
to wear me down. During a single
three-year period, I’d gone through
a divorce, gotten re-married, and
given birth to a daughter who was
born prematurely.
Rather than allowing this to slow
me down, I kicked myself into high
gear. I became Super Mom, Super
Wife, and Super Doctor—juggling
my patients, my students, and my
family…and rushing madly from
one task to another.
My body couldn’t handle the
stresses I was loading on it. I
began to feel tired and have trouble
sleeping. Then I started getting
swollen glands and frequent sore
throats.
Finally, I had a full-fledged health
breakdown. I became so worn out
and weak that I could hardly move.
My digestive system shut down to
the point that the only foods I could
tolerate were boiled potatoes and
steamed vegetables!
And food wasn’t the only thing
my body couldn’t tolerate: anytime
I was exposed to perfumes, lawn
chemicals, or household cleaners, I’d
get dizzy and feel like I was going to
faint.
I’d break down in tears and
wonder how I would ever get

But you know what? I dug

take a lot of time or expense.
And those are the solutions I’d
like to share with you, starting right
now!

The aging process
doesn’t help either
The older we get, the harder our
bodies have to work to maintain the
acid/alkaline balance. For example,
oxygen is essential to keeping your
body alkaline. Yet your lungs’
ability to take in oxygen declines
one percent per year on average.
It peaks for women at age 20, and
by age 70, your oxygen intake is
reduced by half.
What’s more, after midlife,
your pancreas produces less of the
bicarbonate that keeps your body
alkaline.
So what does your body do to
make up for this? It starts taking
calcium, magnesium, and other
alkaline minerals from your bones!
This happens day after day, year
after year, until one day you have a
bone density test and your doctor
says “you have early osteoporosis.”
And osteoporosis is just one of
the problems caused by acidity.
When your joints are acidic, you
have joint pain. When your muscle
tissues are acidic, you feel tired
and achy. When the tissues of your
brain are acidic, you feel mentally
foggy. And when the tissues in
your respiratory tract are acidic,
they release histamine, causing
sneezing, sniffling, and other allergy
symptoms.
No wonder so many women feel
lousy!
But here’s good news: you can
reverse all these problems, simply
by correcting your acid/alkaline
imbalance.
So how do you correct your
acid/alkaline imbalance? One way
is to cut down on meats, dairy, and
starches, while eating more fresh
vegetables. Of course, this isn’t
always easy to do. If you have a busy
schedule, you may have to eat on the
run like I do. And if, like me, you
have an “empty nest” family, you’re
less likely to cook as often now that
the kids are gone and you’re cooking
for just one or two people.
Don’t worry, though. There’s a
quick fix you can use to instantly
rebalance your body’s pH. It’s quick,
it’s easy, and it costs just pennies.
And best of all, it’s something you
probably already have on hand!
The “Miracle Cure” in

The quick fix I’m talking about
is baking soda! That’s right, that
little yellow box you keep in your

a highly alkaline substance. All you

I know it sounds too simple. But
scientific studies prove it! In one
study, researchers measured the pH

crystals that cause joint pain and
kidney stones. And in several other
studies, athletes taking baking soda
were able to improve their speed
in races and increase the amount
of time they could exercise before
getting exhausted.

there’s one simple cure you can use
to beat osteoporosis … fatigue …
joint pain … muscle aches … brain
fog … and allergies? You’d probably
be skeptical. Yet it’s true. It’s the first
thing I did to nurse myself back to
health … and it’s also worked on
hundreds of my patients.
What is it? Simply to balance
your acid and alkaline level.
You see, if you suffer from any of
the ailments I mentioned above, the
common cause is too much acidity
in your body. Neutralize this acidity,
and your problems often disappear.
Here’s why:
Almost all of the body’s functions
require a slightly alkaline state. This
includes immunity, cardiovascular
function, muscle function, brain
function, tissue health, and energy
output.
Every minute of every day, your
body works to get rid of excess acid.
In fact, almost every cell of your
body contains alkaline substances
such as calcium, magnesium,
and bicarbonate. These alkaline
substances neutralize the acid in
your body.
In addition, your lungs regulate
pH by breathing in alkaline oxygen
and breathing out acidic carbon
dioxide. And your kidneys filter out
excess acid so that it’s excreted in
your urine.
It’s a perfectly choreographed
balancing act. And it works
wonders.
But here’s the problem: today’s
modern lifestyle creates a lot more
acidity than your body can handle.
First off, the typical American
diet is filled with acid-forming foods
like wheat, dairy products, red meat,
sugar, and coffee. In fact, the USDA
did a study and found that the
average American eats six times more
acidic foods than alkaline ones!
And even if you eat a healthy
diet, the chances are good that you’re
still getting too much acid. That’s
because even healthy stuff like citrus
fruits, vitamin C, and vigorous
exercise are all acid-forming!
But that’s not all. Frequent flying,
air pollution, and over-the-counter
medications all make your body
acidic. And if you’re under physical
or mental stress (and who isn’t these
days!), you use more nutrients and
generate more acidic waste products
If your memory’s not what
it used to be, then you’ll be
interested in hearing about
a recent university study. The
study found that you can
improve your memory by
chewing gum!
Researchers took 75 adults and
gave them a 20-minute battery
of memory tests. One-third of
the participants chewed gum
during the tests. Another third
took the test without chewing.
And the remaining third were
simply asked to mimic chewing
movements with nothing in their
mouths.
Result: the gum-chewers’
scores were 24 percent higher on
immediate word-call, and 36%
higher on delayed word re-
call. Let me put these numbers
in perspective for you: If you’d
taken the delayed memory test and
gotten a grade of “64” on it, chewing
gum would have boosted your score
to a perfect 100! That’s pretty darned
impressive.
Why does chewing gum boost
people’s memory scores? The
researchers aren’t sure. But they
have their theories.
One theory is that chewing gum
boosts activity in the hippocampus,
an area in the brain important
for memory. This is backed up
by MRI studies that showed the
hippocampus lighting up when
people chew.
Another theory poses a far
simpler explanation: It’s been
shown that when people chew
gum, their heart beats faster.
Naturally, this would result in
greater blood flow and more
oxygen to the brain.
Whatever the reason, you may
want to consider chewing gum the
next time you need your memory
to be sharp. But please, please,
please avoid chewing gum that is
loaded with sugar. And stay away
from gum that is sweetened with
nasty chemicals like aspartame or
sucralose.
Instead, choose a brand that is
sweetened with xylitol. Xylitol-
sweetened gum is completely safe,
it doesn’t raise your blood sugar,
and studies show that it’s actually
good for your teeth and gums. So
grab some and chew away!

only.
You see, most health publications
give the same advice for both
men and women. And this is a
big mistake. Did you know, for
example, that the female symptoms
of a heart attack are different from
the male symptoms? Or that a drug
can act one way on a woman and
another way on a man? Or that
the causes of female anxiety are
the exact opposite of the causes of

I decided years ago to start writing

Now, I know there are other

Secret #2
A Hidden Cause of
Fatigue, Weight Gain,
Memory Loss, and More
What do insomnia, fatigue,
depression, weight gain, memory
loss, and high cholesterol have in
common? They can all be caused by
an under-active thyroid.
The thyroid is a small gland
located in your neck that secretes
just one teaspoon of hormones each
year. Yet that one teaspoon can have
a huge effect on your health and well-
being. It controls your metabolism,
regulates your body’s other
hormones, and affects everything
from your skin and hair to your
mood and ability to handle stress.
Unfortunately, many women
over 40 have under-active thyroids.
The American Association of
Endocrinologists estimates that 13
million Americans have thyroid
disorders, with more than half
undiagnosed. And this figure
doesn’t include women with sub-
clinical hypothyroidism, a condition
where thyroid function is weak
enough to cause health problems but
not weak enough to be classified as a
“disease.”
In my own medical practice,
I found that nearly a third of the
women who came to see me had
some type of thyroid problem. And
when we corrected the problem,
their energy and vitality came
roaring back!
So how can you tell if you have
an undiagnosed thyroid problem?
Start by performing this simple test:
Take an old-fashioned glass
thermometer, shake it down, and put
it on your night table before you go
to bed.
Immediately upon waking, put
the thermometer snugly in your
armpit for a full 15 minutes. (It’s
important that you make as little
movement as possible while doing
this. It’s also important that you do
it as soon as you wake up, before
you’ve gotten out of bed or done any
moving around.)
After 15 minutes, read and record
the temperature and date. Then
repeat the process for 3 straight days.
The normal temperature should
be between 97.8 and 98.2 degrees.
If your temperature is below 97.8
degrees, the
chances are good
that you have
an under-active
thyroid gland.
Fortunately,
thyroid problems
can be corrected
or even cured
for good. And to
show you how, I’ve written a special
report called The Thyroid Solution. In
this report, you’ll discover:
 How to cure a sluggish
thyroid just by taking two

Together, they jump-start your

energy roaring back.

Secret #3
How to Restore Your
Health by Ridding Your

You take vitamins...you take
minerals...but still you feel lousy.
Why?
The reason is that putting good
stuff into your body is not always
enough. Sometimes you have to
take the bad stuff out!
If you’re like most women,
your body is filled with toxins. In
fact, the Environmental Protection
Agency estimates there are over
70,000 different toxins that we can
be exposed to at any moment. These
toxins are in the air you breathe
–even if you have a top-of-the-line
air-purifier. They’re in the water
you drink—even if that water comes
from a remote mountain stream in
France. And they’re in the foods you
eat—even if you buy organic.
Our Livers Can
Hardly Keep Up With
the Ever Growing
Parade of Toxins
Your liver is the organ that
deactivates and removes toxic
chemicals from your body. It filters
out the toxins, and with the help
of enzymes, transforms them into
harmless metabolites that can be
For years, you’ve been hearing
about how Japanese women
rarely get hot flashes or
menopausal symptoms. And for
years, you’ve been reading it’s been
due to their consumption of soy
products.
But let’s face it. Lots of
American women have followed
the advice to add soy to their diets.
But they’re still getting hot flashes,
mood swings, and other symptoms.
Could it be there’s another
reason our Japanese sisters sail
though menopause without having
the same problems we do?
It appears that the answer is
“yes.” And it appears that the secret
may be a substance called gamma
oryzanol.
Gamma oryzanol is a compound
found in rice bran oil. It has a long
Why Japanese Women Almost Never Have Hot Flashes
or Menopausal Symptoms (Surprise: It’s Not Soy!)
history of success in Japan, where
doctors prescribe it regularly.
Two notable studies prove gamma
oryzanol’s effectiveness. In the first
study, researchers took women who’d
had hysterectomies and gave them 100
mg of gamma oryzanol, three times a
day, for 38 days. Result: more than
67% of women saw their symptoms
cut in half!
In the second study, 40 peri-
menopausal women received 300
mgs of gamma oryzanol for 4 to 8
weeks. A whopping 90% of those
women saw improvement, with
40% rating their improvement as
“excellent.”
No negative side effects were
reported in the studies, but there
was one unforeseen positive effect:
the women who took gamma
oryzanol reduced their cholesterol
and triclyceride levels, while
increasing beneficial HDL!
If you have hot flashes or other
menopausal symptoms, I suggest

Secret #4
It’s Not Just What
You Eat, It’s What Your
Body Absorbs
The fabulous Rosalind Russell,
a.k.a. Auntie Mame, once quipped,
“Life is a banquet, and most poor
suckers are starving to death.” Well,
despite all your best intentions,
you could be one of those “poor
suckers.”
You may be eating a healthy,
well balanced, organic meal
complete with all the right servings
of fruits, vegetables and grains
without benefiting from any of the
nourishing ingredients.
That’s because it’s not just what
you eat, it’s how your body digests
it.
When our digestion is working
well, we absorb nutrients and
supplements with ease. We stay
healthy, energetic, and resistant to
disease.
But as we age, our enzyme
production diminishes, our
intestines move slower, and
digesting a meal takes longer.
If you’re like many of my readers,
you may already be taking steps to
improve your digestive function.
You may be taking probiotic
supplements … or even taking
digestive enzymes with your meals.
But, despite your best intentions,
you could be coming up way
short. You see, many products on
the market today are practically
useless. What’s more, many women
are unwittingly making common
mistakes that can actually de-activate
those problems!
For example, if you’re taking
the enzyme bromelain, you should
know that foods such as oysters and
chocolate can actually de-activate the
enzyme!
And if you’re taking probiotics,
you should know that many of the
brands have flunked independent
lab tests!
Is Your Bacteria Dead
as a Doornail?
After analyzing 55 products
labeled “probiotic,” researchers
found that only 13% of the products
contained all the bacteria types listed
on the label. More than a third of the
powdered products contained no
living bacteria whatsoever!
Part of the problem is that these
products have a limited shelf life.
The longer a product sits around, the
lower the live bacteria count. And if
your favorite probiotic supplement
was stuck on a hot truck for three
days on its way to your local health
food store, the live bacteria content is
next to nil!
And you can’t rely on the label.
Sometimes the producer of one
probiotic will tout the health benefits
and scientific studies which were
Coloring your hair can make
you look great. But it may
also increase your risk of
cancer!
The danger first came to light
when researchers noticed that
hairdressers had the highest rate
of breast cancer of any profession.
This finding led to several studies
on the link between hair dye and
cancer.
One study found that women
who use hair dye at least once a
month are twice as likely to develop
bladder cancer as those who do not.
And women who have regularly
used hair dye for at least 15 years
have triple the risk!
Another study compared 459
people who had bladder cancer to
665 people who did not. The study
found that women who used hair
dye had a higher rate of bladder
cancer. And it didn’t matter whether
the women used permanent, semi-
permanent, or rinse. All 3 types
raised cancer risk.
Still another study found that
a woman’s risk of bladder cancer
depends on how well her body ex-
cretes arylamine, a chemical found
in permanent hair dyes.
Why would putting chemicals
in your hair cause bladder cancer?
Because these chemicals penetrate
the skin on your scalp and enter
your bloodstream. The blood is then
filtered by the kidneys and works
its way into the urine in your blad-
der. Since the lining of the bladder
is very sensitive, exposure to the
chemicals leads to cell damage that
develops into cancer.
Fortunately, there are steps you
can take to protect yourself.
First of all, make sure you drink
plenty of water before, during, and
after getting your hair colored.
This will keep urine moving
through your bladder,
reducing your exposure
to carcinogens. (A
1999 study found that
people who drink ten
or more glasses of wa-
ter a day have almost
half the risk of blad-
der cancer as people
who drink less than five
glasses.)
Secondly, and most
importantly, you should keep
your exposure to chemical dyes
to a bare minimum. Two options
include foiling and highlights, as less
dye touches your scalp. But an even
better option is to use natural, plant-
based hair dyes.
If you’ve tried
natural dyes like
henna and been
dissatisfied with
the color, I have
great news for
you: Aveda
makes a terrific
hair dye that’s
97% plant
based. You
can get it at
most health food
stores, and you can
use it even if you get
your hair colored at a salon. Just
bring the dye with you and have
your stylist apply it.
What if you’ve already been
using chemical hair dye for years?
Then I recommend that you detox
your body with supplements like
milk thistle and NAC. You should
also take plenty of cancer-fighting
antioxidants, namely vitamin A, C
and bioflavonoids. These antioxi-
dants fight cell damage and boost
the production of collagen in the
urinary tract. They also increase
your body’s production of gluta-
thione, a key player in your body’s
detoxification process.
I recommend that you take TK
mg per day of vitamin C, TK iu of
vitamin A, TK iu of vitamin E, and
TK mg of mixed bioflavonoids.

Secret #5
The Best Defense
Against Stress
Stress does more than just leave
your stomach in knots and your
head pounding. Get enough of it,
and it can actually kill you.
I know it sounds dramatic,
but it’s true! Research shows that
stress can lead to a whole host of
illnesses including depression,
obesity, high blood pressure, heart
disease, diabetes, brain atrophy, and
osteoporosis.
The daily onslaught chips away
at your immune system, opening the
way to viral and bacterial infections,
and even cancer. Stress eats away
at your digestive tract and lungs,
promoting ulcers and asthma. It
weakens your heart, leading to
stroke and disease. Is it any wonder
that stress is linked to six of the
leading causes of death?
You’ve probably heard the
typical advice about how to lower
stress—things like diet, exercise, and
breathing and relaxation techniques.
But did you know that you can
go a long way toward handling
stress simply by taking the right
supplements? It’s true!
One supplement that works
amazingly well is an herb called
rhodiola. Also known as “roseroot,”
it grows in the polar regions of
Europe and Asia. It’s been used for
decades in Russia, Sweden, Norway,
France, Germany and Iceland.
More than 180 studies have
been published on this remarkably
versatile herb. And research shows
it can boost your physical and
mental performance as well as help
reduce the effects of stress. All
without any negative side effects.
Recently, a group of researchers
tested rhodiola on some of the most
stressed out professionals you’d ever
want to meet: doctors on night duty!
Half the doctors were given
rhodiola, while the other half
received a placebo. The results
were nothing short of amazing. The
doctors taking rhodiola significantly
reduced their stress-related fatigue.
And these same doctors also
improved their short-term memory
and concentration. And they
benefited from improved calculation,
and faster audiovisual perception as
well.
As if that wasn’t proof enough
of the power of rhodiola, research
also shows that rhodiola can help
alleviate stress-induced insomnia,
depression, poor appetite, irritability,
hypertension, and headaches.
In my FREE report, The Best
Defense Against Stress, I tell you
exactly where you can find
quality rhodiola, as well as my
recommended dose. And I also
share these other stress-busting
secrets with you:
 Why stress makes your body
more acidic. And
how to prevent
this nasty process
from ruining your
health.
 The top stress-
busting foods.
Calm you down
and nourish your
adrenal glands, too.
 How to tap into the energy
points in your body and use
them to beat fatigue, reduce
stress, and even lose weight! No
acupuncture needles or massage
required; just a simple technique
you can do while sitting in your
favorite chair.
 4 foods to avoid if you have a
lot of stress in your life. (One
of them is a popular fruit juice).
How and why they worsen your
symptoms…plus what to eat
instead.
 The 5 best supplements to take if
you’re under a lot of stress. They
regulate your neurotransmitters,
your blood sugar, your cellular
energy, and more.
Don’t let constant stress eat away
at your health. Send for this report
today. It’s free with your risk-free
trial subscription to the The Lark
Letter.
Every month in The Lark Letter,
you’ll get advice on how to look
better, feel better, and stay out of the

And you’ll get these remedies not

And every day there are new studies,

My mission in publishing The
Why they live longer than
other musicians…and
how you can use this
secret to add years to your life.
Did you know that orchestra
conductors live longer than
almost any group of people? It’s
true! In fact, many of the famous
conductors of the past lived well
into their 80s and 90s … at a time
when the average life expectancy
was 50!
The list of conductors includes
Leopold Stokowsi (95), Pablo
Casals (96), Nadia Boulanger (90),
and Arturo Toscanini (89). And
not only did they live long, healthy
lives, but they were known for their
vitality and vibrancy in their later
years.
At first, researchers speculated
that the reason these musicians
lived such long healthy lives was
their continual exposure to music.
But this was not true, since similar
longevity was not found among
other types of musicians, only
The Amazing Longevity Secret
of Orchestra Conductors
orchestra conductors.
So what’s the secret
to their health and
longevity? Believe it
or not, it’s the “wing-
flapping” motions they
do while performing. In
fact, research shows that
upper body exercises like conducting
provide a better cardiovascular work-
out than lower-body exercises like
walking, jogging, and bicycling!
That’s right; rather than killing
yourself running or jogging, you can
get an even better work-out by doing
these simple conducting movements.
Why? Because these upper-body
movements expand the muscles of
the chest and open the lungs. When
your lungs are fully expanded,
oxygen floods your entire body,
reaching every nook and cranny.
In addition, the movements cause
your heart to pump vigorously,
which propels blood and nutrients
to your muscles and organs. Blood
and oxygen are finally able to reach
tight, tense, constricted areas. This
lowers your blood pressure. It
also gets better blood
circulation to your
brain, which sharpens
your thinking.
Imagine getting all of
these health benefits
from one simple
activity!
You know, so
many of us spend
our time in constricted positions
that reduce the flow of blood and
oxygen. We cradle the telephone
between our head and shoulders
while we cook dinner or fold the
laundry. Or we sit at the wheel
of a car, slouched forward with
shoulders rounded. Or we sit
hunched over our desks, pecking
away at computer keys. Is it any
wonder we’re tired, achy, and sore
at the end of the day?
The good news is that you can
feel healthier and more vibrant
simply by doing wing-flapping
exercises for 10 minutes per day.
You’ll get complete instructions
in your FREE report, 101 Simple
Health Secrets Every Woman Should
Know.

FREE REPORT #6
Did you know that
heart attacks kill more
women over 60 than
men? It’s true!
Yet doctors
continue to think
of heart disease
as a “man’s
disease”—even
to the point of dismissing our
symptoms. One study found that
women wait 6 minutes longer for an
electrocardiogram than men do.
Another study found that women
wait 23 minutes longer than men
for “clot-buster” treatments, which
can stop a heart attack and lessen
damage to the heart muscle.
But that’s not all: a Gallup Poll
found that 9 out of 10 doctors were
unaware that there are differences in
heart attack symptoms between men
and women.
Yes, our symptoms are different
from men’s. We don’t usually
suffer from crushing chest pain
like men do. Instead, we get more
subtle symptoms like weakness and
nausea. The symptoms sneak up
on us slowly … and all too often we
mistake them for something less
serious.

you. In it, you’ll find out all about
the early warning symptoms of

thin? One key factor
is what I call “energy
conversion.”
Here’s how it
works. When you
eat a meal, your
body uses a certain
amount of energy
just to digest that
meal.
But some people use up more
energy than others. In naturally
skinny people, heat production can
go up by as much as 40% after a
meal. That means these lucky folks
begin to burn fat and turn it into
energy right from the get-go.
But in people with weight
problems, heat production may rise
only 10% or even less. Their food
energy is being stored as fat rather
than burned for energy. No wonder
it’s so hard to lose those extra
pounds!
But here’s a little slimming
secret. You can increase the amount
of energy burned after a meal …
simply by taking two nutritional
supplements!

amino acid L-carnitine. Research
shows that L-carnitine carries fats
into the mitochondria of your cells,
where they can be burned for fuel.

supplement, CoQ10, comes into

produces that energy. It takes the
fats and produces ATP (adenosine
triphosphate), the body’s most readily
available form of
energy.

Finally, a CURE for Interstitial Cystitis Works

If you’re one of the estimated
one-million American women
who suffer from Interstitial
Cystitis, I don’t have to tell you
how miserable it is.
You’re up 3, 4 or more times a
night to urinate. You can’t leave
your house to run errands without
mapping the restrooms along your
route. And if you’re like most
women with IC, you can’t even
make love to your partner without
having intense pain the next day.
Conventional treatments for
IC are unpleasant and largely
ineffective: You can have someone
distend your bladder, leaving
you in excruciating pain. You
can have DMSO installed in your
bladder, leaving you smelling like
a combination of rubbing alcohol
and garlic as the solvent leaks from
your pores for days. Or you can
take oral Elmiron and hope you’re
one of the 30% of women with IC
that get some improvement from
the drug.
Of course, you can also try
natural remedies like baking soda,
marshmallow root, and watching
your diet. These remedies work
fairly well and are certainly more
pleasant than the conventional
treatments. But while they’re OK at
managing your symptoms, they do
nothing to address the root cause of
the disease.
Well, here’s great news.
Scientists have now discovered a
cure for IC, one that actually re-
builds the lining of your bladder
and also prevents its future break-
down!
You see, these scientists have
found that the protective layer
of your bladder is composed of
three substances: chondroitin
sulfate, sodium hyaluronate, and
glucosamine sulfate.
They’ve also found that they can
actually repair the lining, simply by
giving women a special preparation
containing these 3 substances! In
fact, a study at Tufts University found
that this preparation worked even
for women who had failed using all
other forms of therapy!
But that’s not all. Recent studies
suggest that the reason your bladder
lining breaks down in the first
place is due to an inflammatory
response. Researchers discovered
this when they looked at the urine
of women with IC and found high
concentrations of inflammatory
substances like IL-2 and APF.
So by adding natural anti-
inflammatory remedies like quercetin
to the preparation, the researchers
were able to get even greater results!
The best news of all is that
now you can take the very same
preparation used in these studies.
The preparation is called CystoProtek,
and it’s getting rave reviews from
women who are using it.
The only drawback with
CystoProtek is that it can take a few
months to fully repair your bladder
lining. Fortunately, there are some
great remedies you can use in the
meantime to keep your symptoms
at bay. Remedies that go far beyond
what baking soda and marshmallow
root can do.
I don’t have room to tell you about
all these remedies here, but you can
find out all about them in a FREE
report I’ve written called The
Interstitial Cystitis Cure.
In the report, you’ll find out
about an amazing remedy that

you can take oral Elmiron and hope
you’re one of the 30% of women
with IC that get some improvement
from the drug.
Fortunately, there are safe, natural
remedies that can bring you relief.
Some of these are remedies you
may have heard of, like watching
your diet…or taking baking soda or
marshmallow root or aloe vera. But
there are also some new remedies
that most people have never heard
of. These new remedies do more
than just relieve your symptoms;
they actually heal your bladder, by
attacking interstitial cystitis at its root
cause.
You’ll find out all about these
remedies in Special Report #19,
and the report is yours free when
you order a trial subscription to The
Lark Letter. And remember, your
subscription is totally risk-free!

As women, we often put others’
needs before our own. And when it
comes to our health, it’s all too easy
to give ourselves the short shrift.
But taking care of your health
doesn’t have to take up all your

actions you can

a dramatic impact
on your health.

in this report,

BOnus #2:
For many women over 50, what
used to be a simple and natural
thing has now become difficult and
complicated. They still love their
husbands, but they don’t have the
spark or desire they used to have.
Or maybe they do have the desire
but are having trouble with dryness
and hot flashes. Or maybe they find
themselves dreading urinary tract
infections or yeast infections.
Well, whatever the problem, you
can solve it by taking two simple
steps:
The first step is to re-balance your
hormones—not with dangerous
HRT but with mild natural remedies
that help your body balance itself.
The second step is to increase
the levels of dopamine, the brain
chemical most responsible for sexual
desire. You see, dopamine levels
start to decline at about age 45…and
by the time you’re 65 they’re about
25% less than they were in your
early 40s.
The good news
is that you can
do this simply
by taking a little-
known Peruvian
herb.
And you’ll get
complete details
on the herb in your
free report, including where to get
the herb and how much to take.
The report also tells you a few
other things you might be interested
in. For example, you’ll find out
about the right way to do kegel
exercises…how to use aromatherapy
to spice up your love life…and 3
amazing aphrodisiac foods you
can share with your partner. These
foods aren’t just folk tales; they really
work!

The Safest, Easiest Way
to Remove
Unwanted Hair
As we grow
older, excess
hair can start
growing in unwelcome
places, like the chin, chest, belly,
and upper lip.
There are lots of ways to
remove unwanted hair, but all
of them have drawbacks. For
example, shaving only lasts a
few days and
can leave an
unattractive
stubble.
Plucking is
more effective
but can be
ridiculously
time consuming. Waxing is
quicker than plucking, but there
is the risk of inflammation, burns,
and scarring. Depillatory creams
can cause allergic reactions and
chemical dermatitis.
And then there are the longer-
lasting treatments like laser and
electrolysis. Advertisements tout
these treatments as “safe,” but I’ve
seen many women suffer disfiguring
side effects. Laser treatment can
cause swelling and discoloration
to the surrounding skin. And
electrolysis carries the most risks
of all: it can result in edema, skin
discoloration, inflammation, and
pit-like scars in the area that’s been
treated.
So what’s the best way to remove
unwanted hair? I recommend
sugaring. Like waxing, sugaring
removes hair at the root, but unlike
waxing, there’s no risk of damage to
the surrounding skin.
My favorite sugaring
product is a product called
MOOM. I use it myself, and I
recommend it to my friends and
patients. What makes MOOM so
great is that in addition to sugar, it
contains chamomile, lemon, and
tea tree oil. Chamomile soothes
the skin, while lemon juice acts
as an antiseptic. And tea tree
oil has wonderful antiseptic,
anesthetic, and wound-healing
properties. MOOM is resin-free,
hypoallergenic, and lasts up to
two months.
You’ll get more
details on MOOM,
including where to
get it, in your
free report

Younger in
Just 10 Weeks.

For years, I’ve been warning
about the dangers of
osteoporosis drugs. And now
my warnings have come true.
Recent studies have linked these
drugs to osteonecrosis of the jaw, an
incurable condition where the bone in
the jaw actually dies!
Some 2,400 people have
developed this devastating
condition, and many are suing the
drug companies. In response, one of
the drug companies issued a press
release saying that these cases “do
not necessarily indicate causality.”
Don’t you believe it!
Here’s why bisphosphonate
drugs can harm your bones, and
why I’ve been warning about them
for years:
Your bones keep renewing
themselves throughout your life,
with older, weaker bone cells being
replaced by younger, stronger ones.
This happens thanks to special cells
ALSO INSIDE…
Why thin women stay
thin and heavy women
stay heavy. Diet and exercise
are just part of the equation.
Here’s the missing link that can
let you slim down and stay that
way for life! Page 17, inside.
Brain fog? Clear it fast with
chewing gum. Yes, chewing
gum. Complete details, page 4
inside.
The dangers of
electrolysis no one ever
warns you about. And the
easier, safer way to remove
unwanted hair. Page 20, inside.
Sore throat? Just put a few
drops of this in your ear. Infection
is gone in just hours! Page 16,
inside.
called osteoclasts and osteoblasts.
The osteoclasts break down old
bone and remove it, and then the
osteoblasts build new bone.
Bisphosphonate drugs work by
disabling the osteoclasts so that they
stop breaking down your old bone.
But these drugs do nothing to build
new bone. So, even though your
bones become denser, that density is
made up of old, weak, brittle bone
tissue!
So why did these cases of bone
death occur in the jaw and not and
not other bones? One theory is that
the problems were somehow caused
by bacteria in the mouth. Well, I
have a different theory.
It’s a medical fact that the
osteoclast/osteoblast cycle moves
a lot faster in the jaw than it does
in the other bones of the body. So
doesn’t it make sense that whatever
bone changes caused by these drugs
would occur in the jaw first? Of
